title: Distributed Agreement Protocol Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequence of steps and message exchanges between processes (P1, P2, P3) to achieve consensus on a proposed value in a distributed system, using a basic two-phase commit as an example.
relationships: Coordinator proposes a value and sends a vote request to all participants
Each participant votes Yes (ready to commit) or No (must abort)
If all votes are Yes, coordinator sends a Commit decision; if any vote is No, it sends Abort
Participants acknowledge the final decision and act accordingly (commit or abort their local state)
